key.name: enabled
key.description: Whether the local caption stream and overlay may run. Off by default.

key.name: source
key.description: The audio source to caption when Live Captions is enabled.

key.name: auto-hide
key.description: Whether the overlay fades away after recent captions settle.

key.name: keep-onscreen
key.description: Whether the overlay should stay inside the current monitor work area.

key.name: text-size
key.description: The caption text scale used by the overlay.

key.name: position
key.description: Where Live Captions should place the overlay.
